'''ngoradhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphopagus|xiphopagus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphopagus|xiphopagus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngoradhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoradhithi|ngoradhithi]] || [[word:ngoradhiji|ngoradhiji]] || [[word:ngoradhishi|ngoradhishi]] || [[word:ngoradhiki|ngoradhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoradhuthuthu|ngoradhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngoradhujuju|ngoradhujuju]] || [[word:ngoradhushushu|ngoradhushushu]] || [[word:ngoradhukuku|ngoradhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoradhuthu|ngoradhuthu]] || [[word:ngoradhuju|ngoradhuju]] || [[word:ngoradhushu|ngoradhushu]] || [[word:ngoradhuku|ngoradhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoradhufthuf|ngoradhufthuf]] || [[word:ngoradhufjuf|ngoradhufjuf]] || [[word:ngoradhufshuf|ngoradhufshuf]] || [[word:ngoradhufkuf|ngoradhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoradhethe|ngoradhethe]] || [[word:ngoradheje|ngoradheje]] || [[word:ngoradheshe|ngoradheshe]] || [[word:ngoradheke|ngoradheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoradhothotho|ngoradhothotho]] || [[word:ngoradhojojo|ngoradhojojo]] || [[word:ngoradhoshosho|ngoradhoshosho]] || [[word:ngoradhokoko|ngoradhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoradhotho|ngoradhotho]] || [[word:ngoradhojo|ngoradhojo]] || [[word:ngoradhosho|ngoradhosho]] || [[word:ngoradhoko|ngoradhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoradhofthof|ngoradhofthof]] || [[word:ngoradhofjof|ngoradhofjof]] || [[word:ngoradhofshof|ngoradhofshof]] || [[word:ngoradhofkof|ngoradhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŠthĂŠ|ngoradhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŠjĂŠ|ngoradhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŠshĂŠ|ngoradhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoradhĂŠkĂŠ|ngoradhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoradhathatha|ngoradhathatha]] || [[word:ngoradhajaja|ngoradhajaja]] || [[word:ngoradhashasha|ngoradhashasha]] || [[word:ngoradhakaka|ngoradhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoradhatha|ngoradhatha]] || [[word:ngoradhaja|ngoradhaja]] || [[word:ngoradhasha|ngoradhasha]] || [[word:ngoradhaka|ngoradhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoradhafthaf|ngoradhafthaf]] || [[word:ngoradhafjaf|ngoradhafjaf]] || [[word:ngoradhafshaf|ngoradhafshaf]] || [[word:ngoradhafkaf|ngoradhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngoradhasha|ngoradhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngoradhshĂ«sha|ngoradhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngoradhrosha|ngoradhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngoradhmusha|ngoradhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngoradhyasha|ngoradhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongoradhnkshĂ«sha|gongoradhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongoradhnkrosha|gongoradhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongoradhnkmusha|gongoradhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongoradhnkyasha|gongoradhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngoraradhasha|ngoraradhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngoraradhshĂ«sha|ngoraradhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngoraradhrosha|ngoraradhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngoraradhmusha|ngoraradhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngoraradhyasha|ngoraradhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongoraradhnkshĂ«sha|gongoraradhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongoraradhnkrosha|gongoraradhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongoraradhnkmusha|gongoraradhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongoraradhnkyasha|gongoraradhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngerĂŠdhasha|ngerĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngerĂŠdhshĂ«sha|ngerĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngerĂŠdhrosha|ngerĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngerĂŠdhmusha|ngerĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngerĂŠdhyasha|ngerĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongerĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gongerĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongerĂŠdhnkrosha|gongerĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongerĂŠdhnkmusha|gongerĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongerĂŠdhnkyasha|gongerĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngorfadhasha|ngorfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngorfadhshĂ«sha|ngorfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngorfadhrosha|ngorfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngorfadhmusha|ngorfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngorfadhyasha|ngorfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongorfadhnkshĂ«sha|gongorfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongorfadhnkrosha|gongorfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongorfadhnkmusha|gongorfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongorfadhnkyasha|gongorfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
